sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 51

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 51:1
items.html:
(to the question) Hasadim de MA de BON
Ima, plainly, is called BON; therefore the MA side in her is called "Hasadim de MA de BON of Ima," meaning: the Hasadim [mercies] that are the MA of Ima, who is called BON plainly. They are the discernments of Bina and Malchut of Bina of MA. (There)
